MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (PRINCIPAL-$4,769.35) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT HULL, MICHELE $1,620.75 PRINCIPAL, $192.27 INTEREST, $270.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,083.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
